title: He That Is Down Need Fear No Fall
content:
He that is down need fear no fall,
        He that is low no pride.
        He that is humble ever shall
        Have God to be his guide.

        I am content with what I have,
        Little be it, or much.
        And, Lord! Contentment still I crave,
        Because Thou savest such.

        Fulness to them a burden is,
        That go on pilgrimage.
        Here little, and hereafter bliss,
        Is best from age to age!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Louisa May Alcott, titled "He That Is Down Need Fear No Fall", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
